headline: Vertex Announces CASGEVY Reimbursement Agreement for the Treatment of Sickle Cell Disease and Transfusion-Dependent Beta Thalassemia in Germany
summary: BOSTON - Vertex Pharmaceuticals Incorporated announced that a reimbursement agreement was signed with the GKV-Spitzenverband for its CRISPR/Cas9 gene-edited therapy, CASGEVY .This agreement secures...
